page_name: Happy Monday, Ghana! As the week begins, we at Providence Specialist Hospital want to remind you that taking care of your heart is always in season. ❤️ Whether you're an adult facing heart concerns or a parent looking for the best care for your little one, we're here for you. **Here at Providence, we specialize in:** 1. Adult and children's heart surgery: Our team of expert cardiac surgeons has extensive experience in open-heart surgery, minimally invasive procedures, and more. 2. Diagnosis and treatment of heart-related problems: From arrhythmias and high blood pressure to valve disease and congenital heart defects, we offer comprehensive diagnostics and personalized treatment plans. 3. A warm and compassionate environment: We understand that heart concerns can be stressful, so we strive to create a welcoming and supportive atmosphere for our patients and their families. Here are just a few reasons to choose Providence for your heart care: Experienced and dedicated team:** Our doctors, nurses, and staff are all committed to providing the highest quality care. State-of-the-art technology: We utilize the latest advancements in medical technology to ensure the best possible outcomes for our patients. Convenient location: We're easily accessible in New Achimota, Accra, right next to Eddy's Pizza and Highway View Bar. Don't wait to prioritize your heart health! Contact us today at 0208608496 or 0302435388 to schedule an appointment or learn more about our services. In the comments below, tell us what you do to keep your heart healthy! Don't forget to share this post with your loved ones who might benefit from our expertise!

page_name: Happy Monday, Ghana! As the week begins, we at Providence Specialist Hospital want to remind you that taking care of your heart is always in season. ❤️ Whether you're an adult facing heart concerns or a parent looking for the best care for your little one, we're here for you. **Here at Providence, we specialize in:** 1. Adult and children's heart surgery: Our team of expert cardiac surgeons has extensive experience in open-heart surgery, minimally invasive procedures, and more. 2. Diagnosis and treatment of heart-related problems: From arrhythmias and high blood pressure to valve disease and congenital heart defects, we offer comprehensive diagnostics and personalized treatment plans. 3. A warm and compassionate environment: We understand that heart concerns can be stressful, so we strive to create a welcoming and supportive atmosphere for our patients and their families. Here are just a few reasons to choose Providence for your heart care: Experienced and dedicated team:** Our doctors, nurses, and staff are all committed to providing the highest quality care. State-of-the-art technology: We utilize the latest advancements in medical technology to ensure the best possible outcomes for our patients. Convenient location: We're easily accessible in New Achimota, Accra, right next to Eddy's Pizza and Highway View Bar. Don't wait to prioritize your heart health! Contact us today at 0208608496 or 0302435388 to schedule an appointment or learn more about our services. In the comments below, tell us what you do to keep your heart healthy! Don't forget to share this post with your loved ones who might benefit from our expertise!

page_name: Happy Monday, Ghana! As the week begins, we at Providence Specialist Hospital want to remind you that taking care of your heart is always in season. ❤️ Whether you're an adult facing heart concerns or a parent looking for the best care for your little one, we're here for you. **Here at Providence, we specialize in:** 1. Adult and children's heart surgery: Our team of expert cardiac surgeons has extensive experience in open-heart surgery, minimally invasive procedures, and more. 2. Diagnosis and treatment of heart-related problems: From arrhythmias and high blood pressure to valve disease and congenital heart defects, we offer comprehensive diagnostics and personalized treatment plans. 3. A warm and compassionate environment: We understand that heart concerns can be stressful, so we strive to create a welcoming and supportive atmosphere for our patients and their families. Here are just a few reasons to choose Providence for your heart care: Experienced and dedicated team:** Our doctors, nurses, and staff are all committed to providing the highest quality care. State-of-the-art technology: We utilize the latest advancements in medical technology to ensure the best possible outcomes for our patients. Convenient location: We're easily accessible in New Achimota, Accra, right next to Eddy's Pizza and Highway View Bar. Don't wait to prioritize your heart health! Contact us today at 0208608496 or 0302435388 to schedule an appointment or learn more about our services. In the comments below, tell us what you do to keep your heart healthy! Don't forget to share this post with your loved ones who might benefit from our expertise!

page_name: Happy Monday, Ghana! As the week begins, we at Providence Specialist Hospital want to remind you that taking care of your heart is always in season. ❤️ Whether you're an adult facing heart concerns or a parent looking for the best care for your little one, we're here for you. **Here at Providence, we specialize in:** 1. Adult and children's heart surgery: Our team of expert cardiac surgeons has extensive experience in open-heart surgery, minimally invasive procedures, and more. 2. Diagnosis and treatment of heart-related problems: From arrhythmias and high blood pressure to valve disease and congenital heart defects, we offer comprehensive diagnostics and personalized treatment plans. 3. A warm and compassionate environment: We understand that heart concerns can be stressful, so we strive to create a welcoming and supportive atmosphere for our patients and their families. Here are just a few reasons to choose Providence for your heart care: Experienced and dedicated team:** Our doctors, nurses, and staff are all committed to providing the highest quality care. State-of-the-art technology: We utilize the latest advancements in medical technology to ensure the best possible outcomes for our patients. Convenient location: We're easily accessible in New Achimota, Accra, right next to Eddy's Pizza and Highway View Bar. Don't wait to prioritize your heart health! Contact us today at 0208608496 or 0302435388 to schedule an appointment or learn more about our services. In the comments below, tell us what you do to keep your heart healthy! Don't forget to share this post with your loved ones who might benefit from our expertise!

page_name: Excited to announce that iSupreme has been appointed the agency partner for Anker Innovations, the global brand behind Anker, Soundcore, Eufy, and Nebula for Ghana and other key West African markets. As Anker expands across Ghana and the West African region, iSupreme will support their growth through influencer campaigns, retail experiences, brand activations, and advertising — helping bring their innovative technology closer to consumers. Over the past 7 years, we’ve helped global brands enter and grow in Ghana — including Flutterwave, Yango, Sonlink Motor, and restaurant brands like RocoMamas, Pizza Inn, Chicken Inn, Ocean Basket, and Galito’s. Now we’re excited to help one of the world’s leading tech brands grow in this region. #iSupreme
